## tscli set dns preferences

Enable or disable MagicDNS for the tailnet

```
tscli set dns preferences [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help       help for preferences
      --magicdns   Set to true to enable MagicDNS, false to disable (default true)
```

### Options inherited from parent commands

```
  -k, --api-key string   Tailscale API key
  -d, --debug            Dump HTTP requests/responses
  -o, --output string    Output: [json yaml human pretty]
  -n, --tailnet string   Tailscale tailnet (default "-")
```

### SEE ALSO

* [tscli set dns](tscli_set_dns.md)	 - Set DNS information
